def negative_regex_compile_in_hot_path():
    rule_id = "regex_compile_in_hot_path"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "re.compile(...) or similar regex compilation repeated inside hot code paths."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
